name: Manicule
long_description:
Manicule is an AI native devrel that owns developer documentation and technical content across social channels. We grew 100% MoM over the last three months to $53k in monthly revenue, and our customers include Supermemory, Greptile, Reducto, Mastra, Agentmail, and more.

It is insanely hard to hire for devrel. Our customers tell us they’ve had roles up for months, paying $300K+ and still can’t find good people. The industry is currently split between SEO/GEO SaaS and agencies that only do videos or in-person devrel. Developer-focused companies also love the velocity AI brings but hate giving their readers AI slop.

Naman has been writing content since he was 13 having worked with companies like Promptlayer, Brightdata, Courier.com and others. Shreyans has been building since 14, built an AI app that got onto App Store Productivity Trending in a month and worked as founding engineer at Supermemory. We met in high school and have built multiple startups together since.
